 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current strategy after Week 17 actions (Day 119)
-- Day119 dashboard before actions: cash $4.619M; individual subs 138,088; enterprise seats 7,473 dashboard / 7,445 active-sub query; open issues 8,279 dashboard (query 9,378: S2 9,330 avg 1.42d, 900 >=2d, 537 >=7d, 362 >=14d, 127 >=30d; S1 11 very stale; D_S07 35 fresh; E3 2 fresh). Week17 metrics: usage 164.3M; new individual leads 7,056; new individual subs 3,470; enterprise leads 369 / 314,913 seats; 0 new enterprise seats; cancellations 5,106; upgrades 1,771; downgrades 4,549; no outage/overload; peak daily usage 28.9M/80M tier6.
-- Week17 economics before actions: subscription payments $4.401M vs costs ads $350k + compute $177.5k + ops $598.5k + dev $231k + capacity $196k + lead cost $4.2k. B tier2 saved ~$280k-$300k/wk compute (actual compute $177.5k; same usage with B3 would be ~$459.7k), but churn/downgrades spiked.
-- Active MRR after Day119 before actions ~$14.231M/mo: S2 $13.803M (A 76,256 / $5.231M, B 61,481 / $8.551M, C 63 / $21k), E3 $398.7k, D_S07 $29.3k, tiny S1/S3/D_S10.
-- **Cash after Day119 actions is $2.921M** after $125k market discovery, $240k group research, $1.333M t8 R&D. Liquidity is low but next-7 current active renewal schedule is ~$3.675M before churn/new sales; expect day126 cash around $4.4M absent a large enterprise wave.
-
-## Day119 config now in force
-- Prices unchanged A=$79/B=$159/C=$349; quotas A=15k/B=500k/C=1M. **Model tiers A=1, B=3, C=4.** B was restored from tier2 because Week17 showed 5,106 cancellations + 4,549 downgrades. Keep B=3 unless cash crisis; B tier2 saved compute but likely damaged B perceived value/downgrades.
-- Capacity tier6 held (80M units/day, $28k/day). Keep tier6 unless peak >65M/80M or a very large enterprise acceptance wave lands; current peak ~29M, but pipeline could add usage.
-- Promotions: global $0. Ongoing by group: D_S07 $40, D_S04 $40, D_S03 $55, S3 $20; all others incl S2 $0. Lead promos: S2 $10, D_S07 $40, D_S04 $40, D_S03 $20, S3 $40; all others $0. Note lead + ongoing may make first month very cheap/free for D_S07/D_S04; intended to test organic conversion only (no paid ads).
-- Ads: ads_strength 0. Targeted ads full replacement = S2 content_marketing $50k/day only. Week17 paid S2 content: 3,936 leads on $350k (0.0112 leads/$), 2,792 subs (~71% conv; plan mix ~41% A / 59% B/C), CAC ~$125/sub before lead cost; keep if lpd >=0.006 and conv >65%, trim to $30k-$40k if support/churn or cap saturation worsens.
-- Spend: global ops $8k/day + targeted ops S2 $75k, E3 $30k, S1 $8k, S3 $2k, D_S07 $2k, D_S04 $2k, D_S03 $1k, D_E02 $2k, D_E08 $1k, D_E09 $1k, D_E07 $1k = total ops $133k/day. Global dev $10k/day + targeted dev S2 $15k, E3 $10k, D_S07 $10k, D_S04 $15k, D_S03 $3k, S3 $10k, D_E02 $7k, D_E08 $5k, D_E09 $2k, D_E07 $5k = total dev $92k/day. Non-compute daily burn now ads+ops+dev+capacity ~$303k/day; with B3 compute likely ~$65k/day at current usage, total ~$370k/day. These are surge levels; do not cut until support/social and churn stabilize, but reassess weekly.
-- Social post Day119 (agent_post_id 18): acknowledged support feedback; funded 24h critical-response SLA, enterprise production triage, more specialist coverage, RAG live, Pro quality upgraded, stale tickets exec review. Watch replies.
+## Current strategy after Week 18 actions (Day 126)
+- **Cash after actions: $4.032M** (dashboard before actions $4.227M; spent $60k E3 L2 research + $75k market discovery + $60k D_S06 L2 research; no new R&D). Active MRR after actions ~$14.319M/mo: S2 ~$14.083M, E3 ~$194.5k, D_S07 ~$40.7k, others tiny.
+- Week18 dashboard before actions: individual subs 137,513; enterprise seats 4,517 dashboard / 4,490 active query; open issues dashboard 8,051 but issue query 9,818 (S2 9,760 avg 2.35d; 1,620 >=2d, 1,088 >=7d, 537 >=14d, 218 >=30d; D_S07 46 fresh; S1 11 very stale; E3 1 fresh). Usage 163.6M; no outage/overload; peak 28.7M/80M tier6.
+- Week18 economics before actions: subscription payments $3.915M vs costs ads $350k + compute $482k + ops $931k + dev $644k + capacity $196k + lead cost $5.6k. B=3 raised compute vs B2 but downgrades improved sharply (1,482 vs 4,549), so keep B=3.
+- Week18 acquisition/churn: S2 content spent $350k, produced 5,744 leads (0.0164 leads/$), 3,964 paid subs (~69% conv; ~34% A / 65% B / tiny C), paid first-MRR ~$523k, CAC ~$88/sub before lead cost. Network added 887 S2 subs. Cancellations 5,523: S2 A 5,094, S2 B 429, E3 C 2 accounts/$205k MRR; A first-renewal retention is weak while B retention is strong. Downgrades now much lower after B3 restore.
+
+## Day126 config now in force
+- Prices unchanged A=$79/B=$159/C=$349. **Model tiers A=1, B=3, C=4.** Quotas raised to **A=15k, B=1M, C=3M** to address enterprise quota complaints. Capacity tier6 held (80M/day, $28k/day); scale to tier7 only if peak usage >65M or a large enterprise acceptance wave lands.
+- Ads: ads_strength 0. Targeted ads full replacement = S2 content_marketing $50k/day only. Keep while lpd >=0.006 and conversion >60-65%; trim if support or cap pressure worsens.
+- Promotions after actions (global $0): S2 ongoing $0 / lead $10. D_S07 ongoing $60 + lead $30 (A first $0, recurring A $19; B first $69, recurring $99). D_S04 ongoing $70 + lead $20 (A first $0/recurring $9; B first $69/recurring $89). D_S03 ongoing $60 + lead $20. S3 ongoing $40 + lead $50. Others incl new D_S06 $0 for now.
+- Spend after actions: global ops $8k/day + targeted ops S2 $105k, E3 $35k, S1 $12k, S3 $2k, D_S07 $3k, D_S04 $2k, D_S03 $0.5k, D_E02 $2k, D_E08 $1k, D_E09 $1k, D_E07 $1k = **total ops $172.5k/day**. Global dev $10k/day + targeted dev S2 $15k, E3 $10k, D_S07 $5k, D_S04 $5k, D_S03 $0, S3 $10k, D_E02 $5k, D_E08 $2k, D_E09 $1k, D_E07 $3k = **total dev $66k/day**. Non-compute burn ads+ops+dev+capacity ~$316.5k/day; with compute ~$385k/day. Ops is deliberately high; taper only after stale S2/S1 issues and social improve.
+- Social post Day126 (agent_post_id 19): no outages/peak p95 236ms; added S2 support pod; shipping tax/document QA fixes; expanded Enterprise B/C ceilings; stale tickets exec-review until <48h. Watch replies.
 
 ## Enterprise
-- ALWAYS query latest open enterprise turns before advancing; reply to every latest non-agent open thread (including `system` new leads). Use true seats via MAX(seat_count); agent rows often show seat_count=1. After Day119 actions latest_non_agent_count verified 0.
-- Day119 replied to 369 new leads / 314,913 seats. Offer policy now: E3 and generic strategic leads B$29/C$59; D_E02 and D_E09 B$29/C$49; E1 B$19/C$39; D_E07 (if any future) B$49/C$89; D_E08 B$39/C$79.
-- Open new-lead pipeline after Day119 actions: ~1,306 leads / 1.223M seats. Main classes: B29/C49 626 leads / 670.6k seats (old E3 and D_E02 mixed), D_E02 B29/C49 314 / 142.3k, new E3 B29/C59 206 / 240.3k, C49/B39 65 / 77.0k, C59/B45 38 / 45.9k, old C69/B49 36 / 38.1k, D_E09 B29/C49 15 / 3.3k, matched low counters #23007 B22.47 (1,605 seats) and #28767 B28.24 (1,556 seats), E1 low 2 / 635. E3 avg response is slow (~24d); D_E02 ~9d. Expect lumpy acceptances.
-- Active E3 unchanged: 6 accounts / 7,445 seats / $398.7k MRR. #5282 C69 1,152 seats (churn-prevention offer B17.74/C49 pending since Day98; last7 usage 0), #5955 C69 537 seats (C6.64 pending since Day105; usage low), #8685 B33.38 371, #14458 B31.46 1,735 (1 fresh issue), #14459 C69 1,818 (C9.08 pending since Day105; paid at C69 around Day118, 1 fresh issue), #19085 B49 1,832 (usage 0, bills around Day122 for ~$89.8k). Do not reject churn-prevention threads; low pending offers may preserve logos/reputation if accepted.
-
-## Segment/unit-economics notes
-- **S2 remains the cash engine but is near cap and quality-sensitive.** Active S2 137,800 vs lvl1 cap estimate ~167k (S2 level2 research due Day122). Week17 S2 paid content economics still good: 3,936 paid leads, 2,792 paid subs, CAC ~$125/sub; first-month cash roughly breakeven but LTV attractive if churn normalizes. Network added ~665 S2 subs. Current MRR $13.803M/mo.
-- Week17 cancellations by end_day: S2 A 4,657, S2 B 447, S2 C 2 (all cancellations were S2); dashboard downgrades 4,549. The issue was not pure B cancellations, but B tier2 likely triggered downgrades/value concerns while competitor events hit A churn. B restored to tier3 + high S2 dev/ops. Day126: compare downgrades/cancellations to Week17 immediately; if still >~4k cancels/wk or >~3k downgrades/wk, consider temporary S2 lead/ad trim and/or S2 targeted promo/dev, but avoid lowering global prices.
-- Support/social is the biggest reputation risk. Week17 social had product praise but also E3/S2 complaints about 10+ day/two-week support silence; S1/D_E08/D_E09 disliked vague 48h SLA. Ops surge is deliberate. Keep ops high until S2 >=7d stale tickets and S1 old tickets fall sharply and social turns quiet.
-- **D_S07 Data Analysts lvl2**: WTP ~$108, usage ~207/day, q_min ~0.422, cap ~71k. Active 284 (127 A,157 B), MRR $29.3k. Week17 organic conversion collapsed: 13 subs / ~895 leads (~1.5%) despite high quality; likely competitor/price/reputation. New promos A$39/B$119 recurring, first A~$0/B~$79; dev $10k/day. No paid ads until conversion recovers.
-- **D_S04 Small Agency Teams lvl2**: WTP ~$133, usage ~248/day, q_min ~0.618, cap ~46k. Week17 0/508 organic conversion because A quality 0.579 was below q_min and B price/quality curve likely not attractive. New promos A$39/B$119, dev $15k/day should make A viable quickly. No paid ads until organic conversion >~20%.
-- **D_S03 Non-Profit Workers newly discovered lvl1**: WTP ~$25, usage ~43/day, q_min ~0.415, cap ~28.8k. Low usage makes A cheap to serve; set D_S03 ongoing promo $55 (A=$24) + lead $20 (first A ~$4), dev $3k/day, no ads. Level2 research due Day122. Watch if organic S2/S1/S3 referrals convert; if poor after one week, stop dev/promo.
-- **S3 Power Users lvl1**: high uncertain WTP/usage; organic S3 leads (~395/wk) have been lost. Week17 started S3 test: B restored to tier3, promo $20 + lead $40, targeted dev $10k/day, ops $2k/day, S3 level2 research due Day122. If conversion remains 0 after quality bump, stop spend. S3 reputation/network influence is very strong, so successful unlock could be strategic.
-- **D_E02 Educational Institutions lvl2**: WTP ~$69.6, usage ~93/day, q_min ~0.481, cap ~301 accounts, seats 63-760, avg response 9.2d. Pipeline 314 leads / 142k seats at B29/C49. Dev $7k/day; no paid ads until acceptances prove unit economics.
-- **D_E07 Telecom Operators newly discovered lvl1**: WTP ~$196, usage ~200/day, q_min ~0.446, cap ~101 accounts, seats 99-1378, avg response 13.6d, huge reputation links. Level2 research due Day122; dev $5k/day; future offers B49/C89. No paid ads yet.
-- **D_E08 Energy Companies lvl2**: WTP ~$139, usage ~120/day, q_min ~0.717, cap ~151 accounts, avg response 13.8d; B3 and group dev make B/C viable. Dev $5k/day; future offers B39/C79. No paid ads.
-- **D_E09 Real Estate lvl2**: WTP ~$90, usage ~80/day, q_min ~0.425, cap ~89 accounts, avg response 3.8d. Pipeline 15 / 3.3k seats at B29/C49. Dev $2k/day; no ads.

import novamind_api as nm, json
cur=nm.vars.current_day; start=cur-6
q=lambda s: nm.query(s)['rows']
print('cancellations end day last 14')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
SELECT end_day,c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(*) n,ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) lost_mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND end_day BETWEEN {cur-13} AND {cur}
GROUP BY end_day,c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY end_day,c.group_id,s.plan
"""), indent=2))
print('weekly cancels by group plan')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(*) n,ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) lost_mrr, MIN(start_day) min_start, MAX(start_day) max_start
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND end_day BETWEEN {start} AND {cur}
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY n DESC
"""), indent=2))
print('cancelled cohorts age')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan, (end_day-start_day) age, COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND end_day BETWEEN {start} AND {cur}
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,age ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan,age LIMIT 200
"""), indent=2))
# possible plan changes? subscription history rows for same customer? count status active old? query all statuses by customer with >1 rows changed last week
print('multi-sub rows with cancelled and active last week sample')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, old.plan old_plan, new.plan new_plan, COUNT(*) n
FROM subscriptions old JOIN subscriptions new ON old.customer_id=new.customer_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=old.customer_id
WHERE old.status='cancelled' AND old.end_day BETWEEN {start} AND {cur} AND new.status IN ('subscribed','active') AND new.start_day BETWEEN {start} AND {cur}
GROUP BY c.group_id,old.plan,new.plan ORDER BY n DESC
"""), indent=2))

import novamind_api as nm, random, statistics, math, json
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
cash0=float(nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger')['rows'][0]['cash'])
# Active subscriptions grouped into cohorts
rows=nm.query("""
SELECT c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan,ROUND(s.effective_price,2) price,s.billing_day_mod30,s.start_day,COUNT(*) n,SUM(s.seat_count) seats
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status IN ('subscribed','active')
GROUP BY c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan,ROUND(s.effective_price,2),s.billing_day_mod30,s.start_day
""")['rows']
small=[]; ent=[]
for r in rows:
    rec={'group':r['group_id'],'plan':r['plan'],'price':float(r['price']),'mod':int(r['billing_day_mod30']),'age':DAY-int(r['start_day']),'n':float(r['n']),'seats':float(r['seats'] or r['n'])}
    (ent if r['customer_type']=='large' else small).append(rec)
# Open enterprise pipeline latest offers excluding active customers
pipe=nm.query("""
WITH last AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
mx AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats, MIN(day) first_day FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
act AS (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM subscriptions WHERE status IN ('subscribed','active'))
SELECT t.customer_id,c.group_id,mx.seats,mx.first_day,t.day latest_day,t.offer_json,t.turn_number,t.sender
FROM last l JOIN enterprise_turns t ON t.message_id=l.mid
JOIN mx ON mx.customer_id=t.customer_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=t.customer_id
LEFT JOIN act ON act.customer_id=t.customer_id
WHERE t.closed=0 AND t.thread_type='new_lead' AND act.customer_id IS NULL
""")['rows']
def parse_offers(s):
    try:
        data=json.loads(s or '[]')
        if isinstance(data,list): return [(o.get('plan'),float(o.get('price_per_seat'))) for o in data]
    except Exception: pass
    return []
open_ents=[]
for r in pipe:
    offers=parse_offers(r['offer_json']); d={p:pr for p,pr in offers}; seats=float(r['seats'] or 0)
    if seats<5 or not offers: continue
    g=r['group_id']; age=DAY-int(r['first_day'])
    # mu = probability this open lead eventually closes in the modeled horizon, before delay filters.
    if g=='D_E02': mu=0.19; kind='D_E02_B29'
    elif g=='D_E09': mu=0.13; kind='D_E09_B29'
    elif g=='E1': mu=0.15; kind='E1_low'
    elif g=='D_E07': mu=0.12; kind='DE07_new'
    elif d.get('B') in (22.47,28.24): mu=0.42; kind='matched_low_counter'
    elif d.get('C')==69 and d.get('B')==49: mu=0.035; kind='C69B49_stale'
    elif d.get('B')==29.0 and d.get('C')==59.0: mu=0.090; kind='B29C59'
    elif d.get('C')==59: mu=0.075; kind='C59B45'
    elif d.get('C')==49 and d.get('B')==39: mu=0.110; kind='C49B39'
    elif d.get('B') in (31.46,33.38,27.67): mu=0.14; kind='B30ish'
    elif d.get('B')==29.0: mu=0.100; kind='B29C49'
    elif d.get('C')==49: mu=0.090; kind='C49other'
    else: mu=0.070; kind='other'
    if age>70: mu*=0.45
    elif age>45: mu*=0.65
    open_ents.append({'group':g,'seats':seats,'first_day':int(r['first_day']),'latest_day':int(r['latest_day']),'offers':offers,'mu':mu,'kind':kind})
print('cash0',round(cash0),'small_subs',round(sum(c['n'] for c in small)),'small_mrr',round(sum(c['seats']*c['price'] for c in small)),'ent_seats',round(sum(e['seats'] for e in ent)),'ent_mrr',round(sum(e['seats']*e['price'] for e in ent)),'pipeline',len(open_ents),round(sum(e['seats'] for e in open_ents)))
cls={}
for e in open_ents: cls.setdefault(e['kind'],[0,0]); cls[e['kind']][0]+=1; cls[e['kind']][1]+=e['seats']
print('classes',cls)
# Known/pending boosts from projects already paid for.
boosts=[(140,0.556),(190,0.001),(191,0.102),(231,0.626)]
# Likely future R&D investment policy (only if cash threshold is comfortable).
future_rd=[(154,1500000,'t9',8000000),(175,1666667,'t10',11000000),(225,2500000,'t11',16000000)]

def pct(vals,p):
    vals=sorted(vals); return vals[int((len(vals)-1)*p)]

def choose_offer(e):
    d={p:pr for p,pr in e['offers']}
    if 'B' in d and 'C' in d:
        pc=0.22
        if d.get('C',999)<=49: pc=0.32
        if d.get('C',999)>=79: pc=0.20
        if e['group']=='D_E02': pc=0.20
        if e['group']=='E1': pc=0.22
        return ('C',d['C']) if random.random()<pc else ('B',d['B'])
    if 'B' in d: return 'B',d['B']
    if 'C' in d: return 'C',d['C']
    return 'B',29.0

def initial_ent_events(days):
    ev=[]
    for e in open_ents:
        age=DAY-e['first_day']
        p=max(0.001,min(0.65,random.gauss(e['mu'],e['mu']*0.45+0.025)))
        if random.random()<p:
            if e['kind']=='matched_low_counter': delay=max(1,int(random.gauss(8,5)))
            elif e['group'] in ('D_E02','D_E09'): delay=max(2,int(random.gauss(10,6)))
            elif age>55: delay=max(3,int(random.gauss(15,10)))
            elif age>20: delay=max(6,int(random.gauss(23,12)))
            else: delay=max(8,int(random.gauss(33,16)))
            day=DAY+delay
            if day<=DAY+days:
                plan,price=choose_offer(e)
                ev.append({'day':day,'seats':e['seats'],'plan':plan,'price':price,'mod':day%30,'group':e['group']})
    return ev

def small_first_cash(group, plan):
    # Approximates combined ongoing + lead promo at signup after Week17 actions.
    if group=='S2': return {'A':69,'B':149,'C':339}.get(plan,69)
    if group=='D_S07': return {'A':0,'B':69,'C':259}.get(plan,0)
    if group=='D_S04': return {'A':0,'B':69,'C':259}.get(plan,0)
    if group=='D_S03': return {'A':0,'B':79,'C':269}.get(plan,0)
    if group=='S3': return {'A':0,'B':69,'C':259}.get(plan,0)
    return {'A':79,'B':159,'C':349}.get(plan,79)

def recurring_price(group, plan):
    if group=='D_S07': return {'A':19,'B':99,'C':289}.get(plan,19)
    if group=='D_S04': return {'A':9,'B':89,'C':279}.get(plan,9)
    if group=='D_S03': return {'A':19,'B':99,'C':289}.get(plan,19)
    if group=='S3': return {'A':39,'B':119,'C':309}.get(plan,39)
    return {'A':79,'B':159,'C':349}.get(plan,79)

def plan_cost_per_day(group, plan):
    # Subscriber compute with B restored to tier3.
    if group=='S2': usage=max(80, random.gauss(178,35))
    elif group in ('D_S07','D_S04'): usage=max(70, random.gauss(230,55))
    elif group=='D_S03': usage=max(20, random.gauss(45,16))
    elif group=='S3': usage=max(160, random.gauss(560,120))
    else: usage=max(50, random.gauss(160,80))
    rate={'A':0.0003,'B':0.006,'C':0.012}.get(plan,0.0003)
    return usage*rate

def simulate(days,seed):
    random.seed(seed)
    cash=cash0
    cohorts=[c.copy() for c in small]
    ents=[e.copy() for e in ent]
    ent_events=initial_ent_events(days)
    active0=sum(c['n'] for c in cohorts if c['group']=='S2')
    market_cap=max(145000,random.gauss(164000,23000))
    cap_growth=max(0.00008,random.gauss(0.00040,0.00014))
    paid_lpd=max(0.0065,min(0.024,random.lognormvariate(math.log(0.0155),0.32)))
    net_rate=max(0.00045,min(0.00135,random.gauss(0.00078,0.00023)))
    conv_base=max(0.58,min(0.82,random.gauss(0.685,0.055)))
    mixA=max(0.24,min(0.45,random.gauss(0.34,0.045)))
    mixB=max(0.52,min(0.73,random.gauss(0.65,0.045)))
    if mixA+mixB>0.995: mixB=0.995-mixA
    rd_done=set()
    # persistent macro/competitor severity for this simulation path
    macro_bad=max(0, random.gauss(0.050,0.030))
    support_repair=random.uniform(0.0,0.035)
    for d in range(DAY+1,DAY+days+1):
        rel=d-DAY
        active_s2=sum(c['n'] for c in cohorts if c['group']=='S2')
        cap=market_cap*((1+cap_growth)**rel)
        denom=max(0.05,1-active0/market_cap)
        rel_sat=max(0.02,min(1.35,(1-active_s2/cap)/denom))
        # Planned ad policy likely trims only when saturation is obvious.
        ad=50000.0
        if active_s2>0.92*cap: ad=35000.0
        if active_s2>0.965*cap: ad=15000.0
        paid=max(0,random.gauss(ad*paid_lpd*rel_sat, max(25,ad*paid_lpd*0.30)))
        net=max(0,random.gauss(active_s2*net_rate*rel_sat, max(18,active_s2*net_rate*0.33)))
        leads=paid+net
        # B3 restoration + high dev gradually recover conversion; random competitor days still hurt.
        cv=conv_base + min(0.075, rel*0.0045) + support_repair*min(1,rel/21)
        for bd,b in boosts:
            if d>=bd: cv+=min(0.055,b*0.13)
        cv-=macro_bad*min(1,rel/35)
        if random.random()<0.018: cv-=random.uniform(0.04,0.15)
        cv=max(0.52,min(0.92,random.gauss(cv,0.035)))
        new=leads*cv
        ma=max(0.30,min(0.62,random.gauss(mixA,0.04)))
        mb=max(0.34,min(0.66,random.gauss(mixB,0.04)))
        if ma+mb>0.995: mb=0.995-ma
        nA=new*ma; nB=new*mb; nC=max(0,new-nA-nB)
        cash += nA*small_first_cash('S2','A') + nB*small_first_cash('S2','B') + nC*small_first_cash('S2','C')
        cohorts.append({'n':nA,'seats':nA,'group':'S2','plan':'A','price':79.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        cohorts.append({'n':nB,'seats':nB,'group':'S2','plan':'B','price':159.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        if nC>0: cohorts.append({'n':nC,'seats':nC,'group':'S2','plan':'C','price':349.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        # Organic lead segments unlocked by promos/dev; no paid ads.
        def add_small(group, lead_rate, cv_start, cv_gain, bshare_mu):
            nonlocal cash, cohorts
            leads_g=max(0, random.gauss(active_s2*lead_rate*rel_sat, max(5,active_s2*lead_rate*0.35)))
            cvg=max(0.0,min(0.65,random.gauss(cv_start + min(cv_gain, rel*cv_gain/21.0),0.08)))
            # t6/t8 global quality raises all boats
            for bd,b in boosts:
                if d>=bd: cvg=min(0.75,cvg+min(0.06,b*0.10))
            newg=leads_g*cvg
            if newg<=0: return leads_g
            bshare=max(0.02,min(0.95,random.gauss(bshare_mu,0.14)))
            # low-WTP non-profit mostly A; S3/D_S07 more B.
            nb=newg*bshare; na=newg-nb
            cash += na*small_first_cash(group,'A') + nb*small_first_cash(group,'B')
            if na>0: cohorts.append({'n':na,'seats':na,'group':group,'plan':'A','price':recurring_price(group,'A'),'mod':d%30,'age':0})
            if nb>0: cohorts.append({'n':nb,'seats':nb,'group':group,'plan':'B','price':recurring_price(group,'B'),'mod':d%30,'age':0})
            return leads_g
        leads_extra=0
        leads_extra += add_small('D_S07',0.00085,0.04,0.30,0.55)
        leads_extra += add_small('D_S04',0.00052,0.02,0.34,0.35)
        leads_extra += add_small('D_S03',0.00095,0.10,0.28,0.06)
        leads_extra += add_small('S3',0.00045,0.03,0.25,0.70)
        # New enterprise leads generated by network; most accept after delay beyond short horizon.
        lam=max(0,active_s2*0.00015*rel_sat)
        e3_new=max(0,int(random.gauss(lam,max(1,math.sqrt(max(1,lam))))))
        for _ in range(e3_new):
            seats=max(120,random.gauss(1000,520)); p=max(0.025,min(0.16,random.gauss(0.075,0.045)))
            if random.random()<p:
                delay=max(10,int(random.gauss(34,17))); ev_day=d+delay
                if ev_day<=DAY+days:
                    plan='C' if random.random()<0.25 else 'B'; price=59.0 if plan=='C' else 29.0
                    ent_events.append({'day':ev_day,'seats':seats,'plan':plan,'price':price,'mod':ev_day%30,'group':'E3'})
        for ev in list(ent_events):
            if ev['day']==d:
                cash += ev['seats']*ev['price']
                ents.append({'group':ev['group'],'seats':ev['seats'],'n':1,'plan':ev['plan'],'price':ev['price'],'mod':d%30,'age':0})
                ent_events.remove(ev)
        # Billing renewals + churn. Retention is monthly at billing.
        quality_bonus=0
        for bd,b in boosts:
            if d>=bd: quality_bonus += min(0.055,b*0.10)
        for c in cohorts:
            if c['age']>0 and c['mod']==d%30 and c['n']>0:
                if c['group']=='S2':
                    # A first-renewal churn has been severe; B retention is much healthier after B3 restore.
                    if c['plan']=='A':
                        base=0.735 + min(0.095, rel*0.0032) + quality_bonus*1.4 - macro_bad*0.75
                        if c['age']>45: base += 0.055
                        if c['age']>75: base += 0.035
                    elif c['plan']=='B':
                        base=0.940 + min(0.030, rel*0.0010) + quality_bonus*0.8 - macro_bad*0.35
                    else:
                        base=0.900 + quality_bonus - macro_bad*0.4
                    if active_s2>0.90*cap: base-=0.015
                elif c['group']=='D_S03': base=0.84 + quality_bonus
                elif c['group'] in ('D_S07','D_S04','S3'): base=0.88 + quality_bonus
                else: base=0.84 + quality_bonus
                ret=max(0.72,min(0.992,random.gauss(base,0.030)))
                c['n']*=ret; c['seats']=c['n']; cash += c['n']*c['price']
            c['age']+=1
        for e in ents:
            if e['age']>0 and e['mod']==d%30 and e['seats']>0:
                eret=0.87 if e['price']<=49 else (0.80 if e['price']<=69 else 0.70)
                eret += quality_bonus*1.2 - macro_bad*0.35
                eret=max(0.40,min(0.985,random.gauss(eret,0.10)))
                if random.random()<eret:
                    # Some high-price accounts accept discount/churn prevention.
                    if e['price']>=69 and random.random()<0.24:
                        e['price']=random.choice([49.0,29.0,17.74,9.08]); e['plan']='B' if e['price']<49 else e['plan']
                    cash += e['seats']*e['price']
                else:
                    e['seats']=0
            e['age']+=1
        ents=[e for e in ents if e['seats']>0]
        # Costs: Week17 surge, then likely taper after backlog stabilizes and t6 lands.
        if rel<=14: ops=172500.0
        elif rel<=35: ops=135000.0
        elif rel<=84: ops=105000.0
        else: ops=85000.0
        if rel<=14: dev=66000.0
        elif d<140: dev=62000.0
        elif rel<=84: dev=55000.0
        else: dev=50000.0
        capcost=28000.0
        cash -= (ad+ops+dev+capcost)
        cash -= (leads+leads_extra)*0.5
        # Compute for small subs.
        for c in cohorts:
            if c['n']<=0: continue
            per=plan_cost_per_day(c['group'],c['plan'])
            cash -= c['n']*per
        # Enterprise compute; varies heavily with usage.
        for e in ents:
            if e['group']=='D_E02': usage=max(25,random.lognormvariate(math.log(85),0.55))
            elif e['group'] in ('D_E07','D_E08'): usage=max(35,random.lognormvariate(math.log(130),0.60))
            else: usage=max(5,random.lognormvariate(math.log(55),0.85))
            cost_per=0.006 if e['plan']=='B' else 0.012
            cash -= e['seats']*usage*cost_per
        # Occasional support/competitor/outage shocks.
        if random.random()<0.012: cash -= random.uniform(50000,350000)
        # Future R&D likely to be started only with comfortable liquidity.
        for rd_day,cost,name,threshold in future_rd:
            if d==rd_day and name not in rd_done and cash>threshold:
                cash-=cost; rd_done.add(name)
    return cash, sum(c['n'] for c in cohorts if c['group']=='S2'), sum(c['n']*c['price'] for c in cohorts), sum(e['seats'] for e in ents)

), true_seats AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id
), subs AS (
  SELECT customer_id, status, plan, effective_price, seat_count FROM subscriptions
)
SELECT lr.message_id, lr.customer_id, c.group_id, COALESCE(ts.seats, lr.seat_count) AS seats, lr.thread_type, lr.turn_number, lr.sender, lr.day, lr.offer_json, substr(lr.message_text,1,500) msg, s.status sub_status, s.plan sub_plan, s.effective_price sub_price

LEFT JOIN subs s USING(customer_id)

ORDER BY lr.day, lr.customer_id
LIMIT 1000

import novamind_api as nm, json

outputs = {}

# Selective research: keep liquidity, but improve E3 pricing data and keep looking for hidden high-EV segments.
try:
    outputs['research_E3_L2'] = nm.market.research_group(group_id='E3', target_level=2)
except Exception as e:
    outputs['research_E3_L2_error'] = str(e)

new_discoveries = []
for i in range(3):
    try:
        res = nm.market.research_market()
        outputs[f'market_research_{i+1}'] = res
        gid = res.get('discovered_group_id') if isinstance(res, dict) else None
        if gid:
            new_discoveries.append(gid)
    except Exception as e:
        outputs[f'market_research_{i+1}_error'] = str(e)

for gid in new_discoveries:
    try:
        outputs[f'research_{gid}_L2'] = nm.market.research_group(group_id=gid, target_level=2)
    except Exception as e:
        outputs[f'research_{gid}_L2_error'] = str(e)

# Core pricing: keep list prices and model tiers; raise B/C quotas to remove enterprise quota friction.
outputs['prices'] = nm.pricing.set_prices(A=79, B=159, C=349)
outputs['tiers'] = nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=1, B=3, C=4)
outputs['quotas'] = nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=15000, B=1000000, C=3000000)
outputs['capacity'] = nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6)

known = [g['group_id'] for g in nm.market.get_market_overview()['known_groups']]

# Promotions: protect S2 revenue; lower discovered individual recurring prices where organic conversion stayed weak.
promo = {g: 0.0 for g in known}
promo.update({
    'D_S07': 60.0,  # A=$19 / B=$99, aligns with WTP and should lift conversion
    'D_S04': 70.0,  # A=$9 / B=$89, aggressive price test after near-zero conversion
    'D_S03': 60.0,  # A=$19 for low-WTP non-profit users
    'S3': 40.0,     # A=$39 / B=$119 for high-usage power users
})
outputs['promotion'] = nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=promo)

lead_promo = {g: 0.0 for g in known}
lead_promo.update({
    'S2': 10.0,
    'D_S07': 30.0,
    'D_S04': 20.0,
    'D_S03': 20.0,
    'S3': 50.0,
})
outputs['lead_promotion'] = nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_promo)

# Acquisition: S2 content marketing remains strongly CAC-positive; no paid ads for unproven segments yet.
outputs['ads_strength'] = nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={})
outputs['targeted_ads'] = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'content_marketing': {'S2': 50000.0}})

# Ops: increase support capacity to attack S2 stale backlog and enterprise support/reputation risk.
# Dev: keep S2/E3 and S3 quality investment, but trim failed/overfunded discovered-segment tests until t6 lands.
outputs['daily_spend'] = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=8000.0, development=10000.0)
outputs['targeted_ops'] = nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={
    'S2': 105000.0,
    'E3': 35000.0,
    'S1': 12000.0,
    'S3': 2000.0,
    'D_S07': 3000.0,
    'D_S04': 2000.0,
    'D_S03': 500.0,
    'D_E02': 2000.0,
    'D_E08': 1000.0,
    'D_E09': 1000.0,
    'D_E07': 1000.0,
})
outputs['targeted_dev'] = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={
    'S2': 15000.0,
    'E3': 10000.0,
    'D_S07': 5000.0,
    'D_S04': 5000.0,
    'D_S03': 0.0,
    'S3': 10000.0,
    'D_E02': 5000.0,
    'D_E08': 2000.0,
    'D_E09': 1000.0,
    'D_E07': 3000.0,
})

# Public message: specific and tied to actions, avoiding unsupported promises.
post = "Week 18 update: no outages, peak p95 236ms. We’re adding another S2 support pod, shipping tax/document QA fixes, and expanding Enterprise B/C usage ceilings (B 1M, C 3M). Stale tickets stay in exec review until <48h. Keep sending refs."
try:
    outputs['social'] = nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post)
except Exception as e:
    outputs['social_error'] = str(e)

# Reply to every latest non-agent enterprise lead/thread.
rows = nm.query('''
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
), last AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN latest l ON et.customer_id=l.customer_id AND et.message_id=l.max_mid WHERE et.closed=0
), seats AS (
 SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) AS true_seats FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT last.customer_id, c.group_id, COALESCE(seats.true_seats,last.seat_count) seats, last.day, last.thread_type, last.turn_number, last.sender
FROM last JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN seats USING(customer_id)
WHERE last.sender <> 'agent'
ORDER BY last.day,last.customer_id
''')['rows']

deals = []
for r in rows:
    cid = r['customer_id']
    gid = r['group_id']
    if gid == 'E1':
        offers = [['B', 19.0], ['C', 39.0]]
    elif gid in ('D_E02', 'D_E09'):
        offers = [['B', 29.0], ['C', 49.0]]
    elif gid == 'D_E07':
        offers = [['B', 49.0], ['C', 89.0]]
    elif gid == 'D_E08':
        offers = [['B', 39.0], ['C', 79.0]]
    else:  # E3 and any other strategic enterprise leads
        offers = [['B', 29.0], ['C', 59.0]]
    deals.append([cid, offers])
outputs['enterprise_to_send'] = {'count': len(deals), 'seats': sum((r.get('seats') or 0) for r in rows)}
if deals:
    outputs['enterprise_send'] = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)

outputs['latest_non_agent_after'] = nm.query('''
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN latest l ON et.customer_id=l.customer_id AND et.message_id=l.max_mid WHERE et.closed=0 AND et.sender <> 'agent'
''')['rows']
outputs['cash_after_actions'] = nm.query("SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger")['rows']
outputs['active_mrr_after'] = nm.query('''
SELECT ROUND(SUM(effective_price*seat_count),2) AS mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE status IN ('subscribed','active')
''')['rows']
outputs['research_table'] = nm.query("SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY project_id")['rows']
outputs['group_info'] = nm.query("SELECT * FROM group_info_levels WHERE info_level>0 ORDER BY group_id")['rows']

print(json.dumps(outputs, indent=2))
